title: Artifact Graph Types
description: Graph structure types for the OrqaStudio artifact graph. Both the Rust backend and TypeScript frontend use these types across the Tauri IPC boundary.

ArtifactRef.title: ArtifactRef
ArtifactRef.description: A directed reference from one artifact to another.

target_id.description: The artifact ID that is referenced (the link target).

field.description: Name of the frontmatter field that contains this reference.

source_id.description: ID of the artifact that declares this reference (the link source).

relationship_type.description: Semantic relationship type (e.g. 'enforced-by', 'grounded'). Only set for refs from the relationships array.

ArtifactNode.title: ArtifactNode
ArtifactNode.description: A single artifact node in the bidirectional graph.

project.description: Source project name in organisation mode, or null for single-project mode.

path.description: Relative path from the project root (e.g. '.orqa/delivery/epics/EPIC-048.md').

title.description: Frontmatter 'title' field, or a humanized fallback from the filename.

frontmatter.description: Full YAML frontmatter parsed into a generic JSON object.

references_out.description: Forward references declared in this node's frontmatter.

references_in.description: Backlinks computed from other nodes' references_out during graph construction.

ArtifactGraph.title: ArtifactGraph
ArtifactGraph.description: A bidirectional graph of all governance artifacts in .orqa/. Built by scanning every .md file that carries a YAML 'id' field.

nodes.description: All artifact nodes, keyed by their 'id' frontmatter value (e.g. 'EPIC-048').

path_index.description: Reverse-lookup index: relative file path → artifact ID.

GraphStats.title: GraphStats
GraphStats.description: Summary statistics about the artifact graph.

node_count.description: Total number of nodes (artifacts with an 'id' field).

edge_count.description: Total number of directed edges (sum of all references_out lengths).

orphan_count.description: Nodes that have no references_out and no references_in.

broken_ref_count.description: References whose target_id does not exist in the graph.
